debug_info.goal:
F : Type
inst✝¹ : Field F
inst✝ : DecidableEq F
⊢ ∀ (cl : Circuit F F) (cr : Circuit F (ℕ × F)) (G : List (Entry F (ℕ × F))),
    wf G cl cr → List.Forall (fun entry => entry.l = (Exp.c entry.r.2).eval) G → cl ≈ Clap.Dedup.dedup F inst✝ F cr

failed_attempts:
by
  intro cl cr G h_wf h_forall
  induction h_wf <;> simp_all [dedup, dedup_, to_var, to_nat, beq]

by
  intros cl cr G h_wf h_forall
  induction h_wf with
  | nil => rfl
  | eq0 G' e c h_ind =>
    simp [dedup, dedup_, to_var, to_nat] at *
    cases h_forall with
    | nil => contradiction
    | cons h_head h_tail =>
      have : to_nat e ∈ [] ∨ to_nat e ∉ [] := by
        apply or_iff_not_imp_left.mpr
        intro h
        contradiction
      cases this with
      | inl h_in => contradiction
      | inr h_notin =>
        simp [h_notin]
        exact h_ind h_tail
  | lam G' k h_ind =>
    simp [dedup, dedup_]
    apply Circuit.eq_lam
    intro x
    apply h_ind
    assumption
  | share G' e k h_ind =>
    simp [dedup, dedup_]
    apply Circuit.eq_share
    apply h_ind
    assumption
  | is_zero G' e k h_ind =>
    simp [dedup, dedup_]
    apply Circuit.eq_is_zero
    apply h_ind
    assumption
